commands.review_summary:
The PR changes the embedded attempt session-lock controller to bound abort-path lock release, force-release stuck retained writes, poison the controller on takeover, and add focused controller tests.

PR surface: Source +94, Tests +67. Total +161 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: on current main a retained withSessionWriteLock operation that never settles leaves releaseHeldLockForAbort waiting on waitForRetainedLockIdle without a bound. I did not run the test because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Manual review is needed because the PR changes session-state lock ownership, has a concrete drain-state blocker, and still needs contributor-provided real behavior proof rather than an automated repair marker.
